_publications._publicationTitle: Basement membrane proteins in extracellular matrix characterize NF1 neurofibroma development and response to MEK inhibitor.

_contextSnippet: TGF-β1 and several ECM components, including FN1, LAMB1, and NID1, were abundantly expressed in the DRGs with TGF-β1 capsule implantation
details: Abundant expression of TGF-β1 and several ECM components including FN1, LAMB1, and NID1 in DRGs with capsule implantation
